title: conyza orientalis
intro: Conyza orientalis, also known as Oriental Fleabane or Oriental Conyza, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Conyza orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
